name: @poly-ai/adk-node
description: TypeScript wrapper for pure PolyAI ADK N-API workflows.

scripts.build: npm run build:native && npm run build:ts
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:test && node --test test/*.test.js
scripts.test:published: npm run build:ts && npm run build:test && npm --prefix published-smoke install --no-audit --no-fund --package-lock=false && npm --prefix published-smoke test
